title: vLLM Optimization Deep Dive
summary: Master vLLM's optimization internals through Triton kernel implementations.

title: GPU Optimization: 10 vLLM PRs
summary: Learn optimization techniques from actual merged vLLM PRs with verified performance numbers.

title: PyTorch Optimization: 10 PRs
summary: Learn optimization techniques from actual merged PyTorch PRs with verified performance numbers.

title: NKI Kernel Programming
summary: Program AWS Trainium from first tile to Flash Attention using NKI — the CUDA of Neuron hardware.

title: Staging Large FMA Dots via SLM
summary: Fix the PTSS overflow cliff on non-DPAS Intel iGPUs by staging tt.dot operands in SLM and tiling K.

title: TD Q-Load for Non-Power-of-2 GQA
summary: When a GPU block-I/O fast path demands power-of-2 extents, pad the awkward axis, read wider, and mask the slack — a general technique, taught through attention's Q load.
